creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

> … At a glance: it may be appropriate to remove …

Sorry, I overlooked the context under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/mirrors/#svn-intro>: 

> … source code and documentation. Changes from the git repo … stable/12 and related releng branches are exported to the subversion repository. This export will continue through the life of these branches. …

So, removal now would be premature.
